case_title: ANDREW LAMBERT VS. MATTHEW THRASHER ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THRASHER, MATTHEW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 706 KEARNY ST., #133, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
